Changed_Other.purpose: Helps players discover safe and high-quality games more easily.

Removed_Other.name: FFlagCliWorkspaceAwareness_Staged

Added_Physics.purpose: Enhances security and prevents duplicate purchases for players.

Added_Other.name: FFlagKtx2LoaderScratchOpt
